preReview.title: New York Red Bulls v Toronto FC: Morgan in a 'good spot' after surgery, says Schwarz
preReview.description: The New York Red Bulls will be without Lewis Morgan for their MLS clash with Toronto FC this weekend after undergoing knee surgery.

QAData.question: Who won between New York Red Bulls and Toronto FC on Sat, 22 Mar 2025 23:30:00 GMT?
QAData.answer: New York Red Bulls won 2–1 over Toronto FC on Sat, 22 Mar 2025 23:30:00 GMT.
